title: Bilhili Yogurt Parfait
description: A creamy and rich dessert inspired by Egyptian flavors, featuring a sweet yogurt parfait topped with crunchy bilhili.
instructions: Combine the yogurt, honey, and cinnamon in a bowl. Mix well until smooth.
In a separate bowl, mix the pistachios and bilhili.
To assemble the parfait, layer the yogurt mixture and the bilhili mixture in a glass or parfait dish.
Drizzle the vanilla extract over the top of the parfait.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled and garnished with additional pistachios and bilhili if desired.
